title: Novice Hunter of The Empires of Kunark
description: This achievement is gained upon completing the following achievements:

title: Veteran Hunter of The Empires of Kunark
description: This achievement is gained upon completing the following achievements:

title: Alchemist's Reagents (Chardok)
description: 'Our aim is not to supplant the role of arcana, but to supplement it. It is by these means we will ascend from herbalists to thaumaturges.' - Mak`ha

title: Atrebe's Study (Kor-Sha Laboratory)
description: Despite his reclusiveness, Emperor Atrebe insisted that his successful works be well documented by personal scribes.

title: Big Time (The Scorched Woods)
description: The Kromdul have fortified their position within the woods but make little effort to expand their domain.

title: Brutal Accolades (Chardok)
description: Various sects exist within the Di`Zok empire with some putting heavy emphasis on brawn as the means of survival.

title: Burned Wood (The Scorched Woods)
description: A selection of fiery flora from the devastated forest.

title: Di`Zok Keepsakes
description: Given their history, Atrebe's creations are not quick to make allies.

title: Dreadleaves (Lceanium)
description: The Dreadlands is known for the beautiful array of colors seen in its tree leaves. Also, dragons.

title: Drinking Solution (Frontier Mountains)
description: Many inhabitants of Konikor see spirits as the solution to rather than the cause of their problems.

title: Frontier Festivities (Frontier Mountains)
description: Instruments and accoutrements of the Sarnak and Goblin tribes in the mountains.

title: Historic Finds (Lceanium)
description: The populous of Lceanium are in awe of these unearthed ancestral treasures. Many of the relics are nearly as old as the adventurers that have returned to Kunark to aid them in their expansion.

title: Jailor's Halls (Chardok)
description: Sarnaks, themselves once enslaved to the Iksar, view imprisonment as a reasonable first punishment to creatures that fail to serve. The second punishment is remarkably more severe.

title: Korshessence (Kor-Sha Laboratory)
description: Samples of materials with varying characteristics, unique to Atrebe's laboratory, but consistently different enough to warrant individual study.

title: Laboratory Labors (Kor-Sha Laboratory)
description: Emperor Atrebe was said to abscond from even the inner council of the empire for weeks at a time. He would return unceremoniously with renewed aspirations and greater plans each time.

title: Lesser Things (Gates of Kor-Sha)
description: Failed experiments would often become interspersed with the personal belongings of enslaved and employed creatures within the laboratory.

title: Memories of Nurga (The Temple of Droga)
description: The mines of Nurga that sit adjacent to the temple of Droga supply the Mountain Death goblins with many of the supplies they need to sustain themselves.

title: Misplaced Tools (Lceanium)
description: Simple devices used by Combine laborers in the reclamation and expansion of the empire's seat in Kunark.

title: Mountain Death Trinkets (The Temple of Droga)
description: The personal possessions of the temple's inhabitants sheds some light onto their daily lives.

title: Natural Treasure (Frontier Mountains)
description: Nature remains the victor in its battle with the warring tribes that aim to expand their hold on these rugged mountains.

title: Portal Dust (Lceanium)
description: A multitude of hues can be found in the remains of the ancient portal site that first connected Norrath to Luclin.

title: Regal Graverobbing (Frontier Mountains)
description: In a strange reversal of fate, you find yourself unearthing the treasures of Burynai.

title: Reunification
description: Tsaph's return to Kunark heralds a new golden age for the Combine Empire.

title: Sathir's Court
description: The reclusive Emperor sought victory with arcana over brawn.

title: Stinkin' Badges (The Temple of Droga)
description: An assortment of badges signifying a goblin's station within the clan. All signify the inevitably of death.

title: Taken Tokens (The Temple of Droga)
description: The Mountain Death goblins use these tokens to convey the story of their society.

title: The Combine's Return
description: Complete all of the following achievements:

title: The Divided Empires
description: Complete all of the following achievements:

title: Torturer's Tools (Chardok)
description: Creatures that fail to subject to servitude after imprisonment are administered a second punishment. There is no third punishment.

title: Trailblazing
description: These inhospitable plains remain untamed, though not for a lack of bloodshed between tribes.

title: Underground Frontier
description: Discover the many 'treasures' within the Mountain Death clan's cavernous temple.

title: Unearthing the Sky (The Scorched Woods)
description: There are those laying claim to the remnants of the great fire.

title: When the Stars Fell (The Scorched Woods)
description: The great fire that fell from the sky brought death but now heralds new life.

title: Where the Obulus Once Stood
description: The charred forest is host to a number of trinkets ripe for pilfering.
